action.reasoning: Observation: Data exploration done — 134 vocab, max seq length 70, images variable size, grayscale. Analysis: Need an encoder-decoder model (CNN + Transformer) for token sequence prediction. Pretrained ResNet-50 available, fine-tune as encoder. Decision: Write baseline model with ResNet-50 encoder + Transformer decoder, train 5 epochs for quick eval and timing measurement.
